title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at UPS India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at UPS India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
